_comment: Source of truth for open paper positions. Cron reads this, marks each ticker, applies exit rules, writes back updates. Manually edited when new signals are extracted from a report (extraction is a human-in-loop step, not automated).

_field_descriptions.entry_date: trading-day date the entry filled YYYY-MM-DD; null if pending
_field_descriptions.entry_price: fill price as float; null if pending
_field_descriptions.structure: equity | option (informational only — paper book treats both as equity-equivalent for marking)
_field_descriptions.ibkr_executable: true if Stocks/Options approved at IBKR can take it; false otherwise

positions.notes: 6th consecutive report flag; 4-of-4 backtest hit rate; +6.50 Term Score, highest in 5/8-5/10 batch. Most-actionable still-open per agent.
